shiftRoster.alertCompleteSelection: Please complete all selections (Employee, Shift, and Dates)
shiftRoster.alertMinOneGroup: There must be at least 1 Team!
shiftRoster.alertSecurityPresetApplied: Security preset successfully applied for June 2026! Please verify dates and employee names in each Team.
shiftRoster.alertSelectStartEnd: Please select both Start Date and End Date.
shiftRoster.alertGroupNoMembers: Team "{{name}}" does not have any employee members yet.

shiftRoster.confirmGenerateOverwrite: Generating a new roster will overwrite conflicting schedule overrides within the date range. Continue?

leave.title: Leave & Calendar
leave.massLeaveWarningText: This deployment will overwrite attendance records for all active personnel within the specified dates.

payroll.subtitle: Manage and generate monthly employee salaries
payroll.confirmApproval: Send this draft to the Director for approval?
payroll.confirmFinalize: Finalize this payroll? Once finalized, payslips will be available to employees.

backup.title: Database Backup
backup.createBackupDesc: Generate a full snapshot of your database including employees, attendance records, settings, and configurations.
backup.restoreSystemDesc: Restore data from a previously created backup file.
backup.securityNoticeDesc: Database backups contain sensitive employee data and face biometric descriptors. Store these files in a secure, encrypted location. Never share backup files through unencrypted channels. Only Super Admins should have access to these tools.
backup.restoringDataWarn: Please do not close this window or refresh the page.
backup.confirmRestore: WARNING: Restoring will overwrite ALL current data. This cannot be undone. Are you sure?
backup.alertSuccessRestore: Database restored successfully! The application will now reload.

unknownAlerts.title: Stranger Face Alerts
unknownAlerts.subtitle: Faces detected by CCTV but not registered in the employee database
unknownAlerts.noAlertsDesc: All detected faces are registered in the system.

bhlSettings.title: BHL Settings
bhlSettings.subtitle: Default Configuration for Daily Workers (BHL)
bhlSettings.defaultStatusHelp: This status will be automatically selected when adding new BHL data.
bhlSettings.defaultDailyWageHelp: This wage will be automatically filled when creating a new BHL, saving your input time.

faceCheck.title: Sensor Alignment
faceCheck.subtitle: Security Controls
faceCheck.errorModelLoad: Failed to load face recognition models.
faceCheck.errorFaceNotDetected: Face not detected. Position your face in the center of the frame.
faceCheck.errorGeneral: Failed to detect face. Please try again.
faceCheck.specsText:
AI ENGINE: T-FACE v2.0
ACCURACY THRESHOLD: 98.4%
GEOSPATIAL SYNC: ACTIVE
ENCRYPTION: AES-256-GCM

faceEnrollment.title: CCTV Face Enrollment
faceEnrollment.subtitle: Register employee face for CCTV recognition (InsightFace 512-dim)
faceEnrollment.howItWorks: How it works: The system guides you through 5 face angles. Each photo is verified in real-time by AI. If a phase fails, click 'Retry Phase' without restarting from the beginning.
faceEnrollment.savingEmbedding: Saving average of 5 embeddings to database...
faceEnrollment.successRegistration: 5-Side registration successful! Face of {{name}} has been saved.

left.title: Turn Left
left.desc: Turn your face to your left

right.title: Turn Right
right.desc: Turn your face to your right

liveCamera.title: Live Camera Monitor
liveCamera.subtitle: Real-time monitoring of CCTV cameras and face recognition events
liveCamera.selectCameraFromList: Select a Camera from the List
liveCamera.selectCameraDesc: Select one of the cameras on the left to watch the live CCTV feed and monitor in real-time.
liveCamera.simulationHelp: Test the system without needing to stand in front of the camera. The simulation time will match the Camera Capture Schedule in the API.
liveCamera.mockingTimeHelp: Leave empty to use current time.

alerts.noInput: No overtime data entered. Fill at least 1.
alerts.overLimitConfirm: Warning: Some inputs exceed the daily overtime limit ({{limit}} hours). Still save?

alerts.noHistoryExport: No overtime data in this month to export.

dashboard.noDevices: No registered machines. Add them in Settings → Fingerprint Machine.

detail.clearLogsConfirm:
⚠️ WARNING: Delete all attendance logs on machine "{{name}}"?

This action cannot be undone and all unsynced logs will be permanently lost!

table.offlineNotice: Machine cannot be contacted — cannot read users

footer.notice: Employees without FP in DB will be registered without fingerprint (profile only)

linkModal.title: 🔗 Link Machine User to Employee
linkModal.description: Link machine PIN {{pin}} ({{name}}) to employee profile in database. The system will also automatically transfer existing fingerprints from machine to database.

enrollModal.title: Register New Fingerprint
enrollModal.description: Select employee and the finger to enroll remotely on the physical machine sensor.
enrollModal.readyDesc: The sensor on the machine is now active. Please guide the employee to place their {{finger}} on the machine sensor 3 times until the machine beeps success.
enrollModal.verifyingDesc: Pulling new fingerprint template from the machine and saving it to the database.
enrollModal.successDesc: Employee fingerprint successfully saved and linked to the database profile. The employee can now use this fingerprint to scan attendance on the machine.

payrollSettings.title: Payroll Settings
payrollSettings.subtitle: Configure salary components, allowance matrix, overtime, and assign employee salaries

form.name: Component Name
form.perAttendanceDesc: Amount will be multiplied by the number of present days.
form.conditionalDesc: Granted if conditions are met (e.g. perfect attendance).
form.fixedMonthlyDesc: Full amount is given every month.

alerts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this component?

umkTab.title: Normal Salary Settings (UMK/UMR)
umkTab.desc: This basic salary will automatically apply to all employees who have a salary type of "UMK / UMR".

alerts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this overtime rule?

table.name: Name

syncModal.title: Sync Normal Salary (UMK/UMR)
syncModal.subtitle: Bulk change salary categories by department

alerts.confirmSync: Are you sure you want to sync the salary type of {{count}} employees to UMK/UMR? Their Basic Salary & Allowances will be automatically populated based on Matrix/Global settings.

matrixTab.title: Allowance Matrix by Position
matrixTab.subtitle: Set allowance amounts by employee position. These values will be the default during salary assignment.

empty.title: Incomplete Data
empty.noPositions: No Positions registered in employee data. Make sure employees have "Position/Jabatan" data.
empty.noAllowances: No active "Allowance" salary components. Please add one in the "Salary Components" tab first.

matrixTab.unsaved: There are unsaved changes. Click "Save All Changes" to save.

sidebar.checkDesc: All changes are logged and audited in real-time by the central node.

alerts.logoSize: Logo file size must be less than 2MB

location.subtitle: Authorized Operational Boundaries
location.strictDesc: Enforce physical proximity requirements via GPS for all check-in/out events.

alerts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this location node?

shifts.title: Temporal Protocols
shifts.subtitle: Operational Shift Configurations
shifts.satHalfDesc: Enable early checkout rules for Saturdays.
shifts.cutoffHelp: Use 0 for 1st to End of Month. Use 25 for 26th of last month to 25th of this month.
shifts.timezoneHelp: E.g. 420 for WIB (UTC+7), 480 for WITA (UTC+8), 540 for WIT (UTC+9).
shifts.otNotifyDesc: Alert HR when shift exceeds 9 hours.
shifts.otAutoDesc: Turn off to rely strictly on manual SPL inputs.

penaltySettings.title: Penalty & Lateness Rules
penaltySettings.subtitle: Configure penalty minutes, attendance rounding, and mangkir penalties.
penaltySettings.roundingDesc: Round up late minutes according to the interval (e.g., per 30 minutes).
penaltySettings.rule1Desc: Penalty for employees who do not have a check-in finger record for the day.
penaltySettings.rule2Desc: Calculated as late only (based on actual minutes), does not become Mangkir.
penaltySettings.rule2Info: This rule protects employees from being marked as Mangkir if they check in, even if they are late. The system will calculate their actual or rounded late minutes, and no additional mangkir penalty is applied.
penaltySettings.rule2AddPenaltyDesc: Add a fixed penalty minutes for each late event.
penaltySettings.rule3Title: Rule 3: On-Time Check-In, No Check-Out Tap
penaltySettings.rule3Desc: Penalty if the employee checks in on-time but does not tap out at shift end.
penaltySettings.simNotesRule1Active: Rule 1 Active: No check-in finger. Status set to {{status}} with penalty +{{minutes}}m.
penaltySettings.simNotesRule1Inactive: Rule 1 Inactive: Calculated as standard Absent.
penaltySettings.simNotesRule2Active: Rule 2 Active: Employee checked in late ({{lateMinutes}}m){{earlySuffix}}.{{extraPenalty}}
penaltySettings.simNotesRule3Active: Rule 3 Active: On-time check-in, no check-out finger. Status set to {{status}} with penalty +{{minutes}}m.
penaltySettings.simNotesEarlyDeparture: Employee checked in on-time but departed early (Early Departure).

security.title: Biometric Authentication
security.subtitle: Personnel Identification Protocols
security.autoEnrollDesc: Automatically update biometric template upon successful matches.
security.encryptionDesc: All biometric templates are processed via non-reversible mathematical hashing. Raw pixel data is never persisted. Security compliance: ISO/IEC 27001

license.title: System License
license.subtitle: Software Activation Key
license.help: Enter the license key provided by the software vendor to activate the product and verify your employee limits and expiration dates.

deviceSettings.bulkFinished: Process finished! Please check the results below.
deviceSettings.syncDetailTitle: Employee Sync Details — Fingerprint Machine Data
deviceSettings.unlinkedEmployeeWarning: Employees on machine not linked to the database
deviceSettings.noLogsWarning: Machine does not have any attendance logs. Ensure the machine is working and employees have scanned their fingerprints.

alerts.selectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one machine first.
alerts.noNewLogs: No new log data on the machine.
alerts.clearLogWarning:
⚠️ DANGEROUS WARNING:
This action will delete ALL attendance log data inside the machine "{{name}}" ({{ipAddress}}).

Ensure all important attendance data has been pulled/synced to the database first. Deleted data from the machine CANNOT be recovered.

Are you sure you want to continue?
alerts.clearLogConfirm: Final Confirmation: Are you absolutely sure you want to delete all attendance log data on machine "{{name}}"?
alerts.clearLogSuccess: Attendance logs on machine successfully cleared.
